title: A Regular Map
description: Parse a regex to build a map of rooms and doors, then BFS to find furthest room.
writeup:
## Approach

The regex describes all possible paths through the facility. We parse it by tracking a *set* of current positions — branches `(` save the set, pipes `|` collect alternatives, and `)` merges them.

## Part 1

BFS from the start room `(0,0)` through all doors. The answer is the maximum shortest-path distance to any room.

## Part 2

Count rooms whose shortest path from the start requires passing through at least 1000 doors.
